topic.what: Process-scoped route authorization restricting VPN-installed internal-route access to explicitly authorized applications
topic.how: eBPF cgroup v2 socket-address hooks enforce a formal total decision function on connect/sendmsg operations with per-principal LPM trie grant lookups
topic.why_matters: Prevents unprivileged malicious processes from pivoting into internal networks via split-tunnel VPN routes that currently authorize entire devices

characteristics.what_it_measures: p50 TCP connect() latency over WireGuard tunnel with full enforcement
characteristics.context: wg_enforce_nocache configuration; nftables adds 7.5 µs (97.3 µs total)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Single-stream TCP throughput over WireGuard tunnel
characteristics.context: nftables cgroup matching achieves only 7,836 Mbps (12% lower)

characteristics.what_it_measures: eBPF cgroup hook overhead on internal-allow path isolated from network/encryption
Unauthorized connection attempts blocked during pivot prevention test
characteristics.context: All pivot attempts from unauthorized processes denied

characteristics.what_it_measures: p50 latency variation with policy size from 4 to 4,096 prefixes
characteristics.context: LPM trie O(prefix-length) lookup independent of map size

characteristics.what_it_measures: Time from epoch bump to new connection block over WireGuard
characteristics.context: UDP immediate; TCP sweeper ~11 ms median
